arts.ttl: Juventus-Napoli: Court overturns travel ban for Napoli fans
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events, the Administrative Court (TAR) of Piedmont has suspended the travel ban imposed on Napoli fans for the upcoming match against Juventus at the Allianz Stadium. This decision comes just hours before the highly anticipated clash, overturning the previous ruling by the Prefect of Turin that had prohibited Napoli supporters from attending the game. The initial ban, announced just a day before the match, had caught many off guard and left thousands of Napoli fans unable to attend. However, the situation has now changed dramatically following a successful appeal by a Napoli supporter who challenged The post Juventus-Napoli: Court overturns travel ban for Napoli fans appeared first on FootItalia.com.
